home.title: Golf Club Advisor
home.subtitle: Choose a club type to start a short fitting quiz.

welcome.title: Golf Club Advisor
welcome.subtitle: Answer a few quick questions and we will suggest three club sets tailored to your skill, budget, and on-course goals.
welcome.disclaimer: Recommendations are illustrative suggestions to guide research—not a substitute for a professional club fitting.
welcome.a11yGetStarted: Get started with the golf club questionnaire

quiz.chooseHint: Choose the option that best describes you right now.

beginner.label: Beginner
beginner.hint: New to golf or refining basics

results.title: Top club sets for you
results.subtitle: Here are three options that align with your answers. Tap “Start Over” anytime to refine your preferences.
results.why: {{summary}} With your {{skillProfile}} profile, {{budgetLabel}} budget, and emphasis on {{goalFocus}}, this setup is a strong practical match.
results.a11yStartOver: Start over and reset the questionnaire

strata16.name: Callaway Strata 16-Piece
strata16.summary: A complete bag with oversized heads and lightweight graphite shafts—built to launch the ball easily and build confidence from tee to green.

wilsonSgi.name: Wilson Profile SGI
wilsonSgi.summary: Super game-improvement shaping, shorter club lengths in key spots, and clear visual alignment cues to help you start lines more consistently.

tourEdge522.name: Tour Edge Hot Launch E522
tourEdge522.summary: High-MOI metals and forgiving long irons emphasize easy speed and stability when you want extra yards without a steep learning curve.

cobraFlyXl.name: Cobra Fly-XL Complete
cobraFlyXl.summary: Lightweight components and a progressive set flow from hybrids to wedges—ideal if you want forgiveness with a more athletic, modern profile.

taylormadeRbz.name: TaylorMade RBZ SpeedLite
taylormadeRbz.summary: Speed-focused metalwoods paired with responsive irons suit players who already strike it reasonably well and want measurable distance gains.

pingG430.name: Ping G430 Combo
pingG430.summary: Tunable fitting story, stable head designs, and predictable gapping—excellent when your priority is dispersion control and confident shot shaping.

titleistT350.name: Titleist T350 Irons + TSR Woods
titleistT350.summary: Premium feel with tour-backed engineering in the metals; a strong match for players who value precision, feedback, and repeatable impact.

mizunoJpx923.name: Mizuno JPX 923 Hot Metal Pro
mizunoJpx923.summary: Compact players-distance profile with a fast face—built for stronger swingers who still want help on mis-hits but refuse to sacrifice workability.

srixonZx5.name: Srixon ZX5 Mk II Set
srixonZx5.summary: Sleek address profile and consistent spin windows reward skilled ball-strikers who want tight dispersion and a clean look at address.
